title: Strata #24 — Dark Red Structural Field

Strata #24 — Dark Red Structural Field mockup

summary: A horizontal abstract painting from the Strata 2026 series, built around a deep dark red field divided by subtle incised lines and geometric planes. Red and cyan blocks create a sense of distance, architecture and suspended spatial order.
concept: In Strata #24 — Dark Red Structural Field, the territory becomes almost architectural. The incised lines divide the surface into quiet planes, while the geometric blocks appear as signs, thresholds or silent constructions within the field. The large dark red space creates a sense of depth and stillness, where ground, structure and thought seem to merge into a single abstract landscape.
commercial_note: This work belongs to the Strata 2026 series, where territory, fault lines, geometric presence and structural silence form a unified abstract language. Its horizontal format, dark red palette and strong cyan accents give it the presence of a statement piece, suitable for contemporary interiors, collectors and architectural spaces seeking depth, tension and refined visual impact.
